channel.title: Bruno Abinader - Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: Converting C-Like Enums to String values in Rust
item.description:
Suppose you have a C-Like Enum in Rust like the one below:

enum Foo {
    SomeValue,
    OtherValue
}

Note: C-Like enumerations in Rust have no parameters (i.e. SomeValue(~str)), and can have their discriminator values explicitly set to a constant value (i.e. SomeValue = 0). See http://static.rust-lang.org/doc …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: CSS Level 3 Text Decoration properties now available in Google Chrome Canary!
item.description:
As of Monday (August 19th), Google Chrome Canary now supports CSS3 Text Decoration shorthand property. Once in Canary, you can enable the "experimental Web Platform features" runtime flag by checking the link below:

chrome://flags/#enable-experimental-web-platform-features

After enabling it, restart your browser and you should be able to use the …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: CSS Level 3 Text Decoration on WebKit and Blink - status
item.description: It's been a while since I wrote the last post about progress on implementing CSS Level 3 Text Decoration features in WebKit. I've been involved with other projects but now I can finally resume the work in cooperation with my colleague from basysKom, Lamarque Souza. So far we have implemented …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: WebKit CSS3 text-decoration properties (preview)
item.description:
WebKit currently supports CSS Text Level 2.1 version of text-decoration property (link). This version treats only about the decoration line types (underline, overline, line-through and blink - the latter is not supported on WebKit).

The draft version of CSS Text Level 3 upgrades text-decoration (link) property as a shorthand to …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: Vim Quicktip: Navigating to function implementation with ctags
item.description: I am a regular Vim user, but I've also played around with full blown IDEs like Qt Creator and MS Visual Studio. One interesting aspect about IDEs is the ability to easily navigate through a function implementation based on its usage on a piece of code. Taking the example from …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: How CMake simplifies the build process (Part 1: Basic build system)
item.description: From my previous blogs there were some posts that got popular due to their useful content, and one that got my special attention is the tutorials on how to set up a basic (and further a bit more complex) build system based on CMake. These posts were left to dark …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: A guide for Qt5/WebKit2 development setup for Nokia N9 on Ubuntu Linux
item.description: As part of my daily activities at basysKom on QtWebKit maintenance and development for Nokia devices, it is interesting to keep a track on latest developments circa QtWebKit. There is currently a promising project of a Qt5/WebKit2-based browser called Snowshoe mainly developed by my fellow friends from INdT which …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader

item.title: 2012: New year, new objectives!
item.description:
Small river over Suomenlinna Island, near Helsinki

Hi all!

I've been out of blogging for a while, mostly because I got involved with a lot of non open-source activities during last year. So my plans for this year are to get back on track with my voluntary contributions as well …
item.dc:creator: Bruno de Oliveira Abinader
